patterns_identified.summary: 5 ML losses in close games (1 run margin) indicate unfavorable variance day; model reads were directionally correct.
patterns_identified.adjustment_rule: On days with 3 or more variance losses in single run games, reduce ML stake by 20% and shift to run lines for top tier picks.

patterns_identified.summary: Multiple model error losses suggest overconfidence in road team struggles or underdog narratives that did not materialize.
patterns_identified.adjustment_rule: Downgrade plus money picks on road underdog ML when opponent is at home with 0.500+ record; require stronger spot than narrative alone.

adjustments_for_today: NYY ML lean at Citi was wrong; NYM home field plus uncertainty on starter should have been a pass.
CHC ML lost to CWS 9 to 8; avoid laying heavy juice on NL teams in crosstown games with wind blowing out.
WSH plus money miss; BAL road struggles did not translate, confirm recent road splits before fading.
STL ML at home lost to KC shutout; Mikolas groundball profile did not generate strikeouts or runs.
ATH ML loss to SF 10 to 1; Webb ace differential was too steep, avoid backing underdogs vs elite starters.
MIL ML narrow miss 5 to 4; injuries to Buxton and Larnach did not guarantee MIL cover.
Gausman K under 6.5 missed by 1.5 strikeouts; TOR pitcher park suppresses K volume for finesse types.
Skenes K missed by 0.5 on 7.5 line; very close, consider 7.0 line threshold for high strikeout aces.
Winning angle: aces plus pitcher parks for totals (PHI at PIT Under 7.5 nailed it 6 runs).
Winning angle: large underdog plus money on road teams at altitude or offense friendly parks (ARI at COL).
Grade C tier picks went 2W 6L; tighten grade C standards or reduce to one C pick per slate.
Grade B tier picks went 4W 2L; maintain current criteria for B tier picks.
monitoring_list: Gausman next start velocity and K rate trend after 5 K outing
